name: unified_content_string_roundtrip
description: UnifiedContent 纯文本形态应能双向序列化为字符串

name: unified_content_array_roundtrip
description: UnifiedContent 数组形态应能保留 Parts 并序列化为数组

name: unified_content_empty_string
description: 空字符串应被识别为 Text 形态

name: marshal_parts_priority
description: Parts 非空时应输出数组而非字符串

name: compute_tool_checksum_stable
description: 同一 tool 多次计算应得到完全相同的 checksum
